hot_rank.reason_selected: 当日新抓取且未展示过：Getting started with ChatGPT 来自 OpenAI 的公开抓取入口，证据链保留原始链接与抓取来源。

clusters.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
clusters.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

clusters.title: Using skills
clusters.summary: Learn how to create and use ChatGPT skills to build reusable workflows, automate recurring tasks, and ensure consistent, high-quality outputs.

clusters.title: Prompting fundamentals
clusters.summary: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.

clusters.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
clusters.summary: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.

clusters.title: Healthcare
clusters.summary: Explore how clinicians use ChatGPT to support diagnosis, documentation, and patient care with secure, HIPAA-compliant AI tools.

clusters.title: ChatGPT for sales teams
clusters.summary: Learn how sales teams use ChatGPT to research accounts, personalize outreach, manage deals, and improve pipeline and conversion.

clusters.title: ChatGPT for customer success teams
clusters.summary: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals.

clusters.title: Creating images with ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to create and refine images with ChatGPT using clear prompts, iterate on designs, and generate high-quality visuals in minutes.

clusters.title: AI fundamentals
clusters.summary: Learn what AI is, how it works, and how tools like ChatGPT use large language models. A clear, beginner-friendly guide to understanding artificial intelligence.

clusters.title: Using projects in ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to use projects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively.

clusters.title: ChatGPT for research
clusters.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.

clusters.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.

clusters.title: Writing with ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.

clusters.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
clusters.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.

clusters.title: Research with ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.

clusters.title: ChatGPT for managers
clusters.summary: Learn how managers use ChatGPT to prepare for conversations, write clear feedback, stay organized, and improve team effectiveness.

clusters.title: Financial services
clusters.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.

clusters.title: ChatGPT for finance teams
clusters.summary: Learn how finance teams use ChatGPT to streamline reporting, analyze data, improve forecasts, and communicate insights more clearly.

clusters.title: Personalizing ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to personalize ChatGPT using custom instructions and memory to get more relevant, consistent, and tailored responses.

clusters.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
clusters.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.
